abilities.name: Path of Frost
abilities.description: The Death Knight's freezing aura creates ice beneath his feet, allowing him and his party or raid to walk on water for 10 min.  Works while mounted.  Any damage will cancel the effect.

abilities.name: Army of the Dead
abilities.description: Summons an entire legion of Ghouls to fight for the Death Knight.  The Ghouls will swarm the area, taunting and fighting anything they can.  While channelling Army of the Dead, the Death Knight takes less damage equal to his Dodge plus Parry chance.

abilities.name: Death and Decay
abilities.description: Corrupts the ground targeted by the Death Knight, causing 62 Shadow damage every sec that targets remain in the area for 10 sec.  This ability produces a high amount of threat.
abilities.cost: 1 Blood Rune / 1 Frost Rune / 1 Unholy Rune / -15 Runic Power

abilities.name: Plague Strike
abilities.description: A vicious strike that deals 50 % weapon damage plus 189 and infects the target with Blood Plague, a disease dealing Shadow damage over time.

abilities.name: Death Strike
abilities.description: A deadly attack that deals 75% weapon damage plus 223 and heals the Death Knight for 5% of his maximum health for each of his diseases on the target.
abilities.cost: 1 Frost Rune / 1 Unholy Rune / -15 Runic Power

abilities.name: Icy Touch
abilities.description: Chills the target for 227 to 245 Frost damage and  infects them with Frost Fever, a disease that deals periodic damage and reduces melee and ranged attack speed by 14% for 15 sec.  Very high threat when in Frost Presence.

abilities.name: Chains of Ice
abilities.description: Shackles the target with frozen chains, reducing their movement by 95%, and infects them with Frost Fever.  The target regains 10% of their movement each second for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Blood Tap
abilities.description: Immediately activates a Blood Rune and converts it into a Death Rune for the next 20 sec.  Death Runes count as a Blood, Frost or Unholy Rune.

abilities.name: Blood Strike
abilities.description: Instantly strike the enemy, causing 40% weapon damage plus 305.6, total damage increased by 12.5% for each of your diseases on the target.

abilities.name: Raise Dead
abilities.description: Raises a Ghoul to fight by your side.  If no humanoid corpse that yields experience or honor is available, you must supply Corpse Dust to complete the spell.  You can have a maximum of one Ghoul at a time.  Lasts 1 min.

abilities.name: Strangulate
abilities.description: Strangulates an enemy, silencing them for 5 sec.  Non-player victim spellcasting is also interrupted for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Mind Freeze
abilities.description: Smash the target's mind with cold, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Death Coil
abilities.description: Fire a blast of unholy energy, causing 443 Shadow damage to an enemy target or healing 665 damage from a friendly Undead target.

abilities.name: Empower Rune Weapon
abilities.description: Empower your rune weapon, immediately activating all your runes and generating 25 runic power.

abilities.name: Frost Presence
abilities.description: The death knight takes on the presence of frost, increasing Stamina by 8%, armor contribution from cloth, leather, mail and plate items by 60%, and reducing damage taken by 8%.  Increases threat generated.  Only one Presence may be active at a time.

abilities.name: Unholy Presence
abilities.description: Infuses the death knight with unholy fury, increasing attack speed by 15%, movement speed by 15% and reducing the global cooldown on all abilities by 0.5 sec.  Only one Presence may be active at a time.

abilities.name: Blood Presence
abilities.description: Strengthens the Death Knight with the presence of blood, increasing damage by 15% and healing the Death Knight by 4% of non-periodic damage dealt. Only one Presence may be active at a time.

abilities.name: Anti-Magic Shell
abilities.description: Surrounds the Death Knight in an Anti-Magic Shell, absorbing 75% of the damage dealt by harmful spells (up to a maximum of 50% of the Death Knight's health) and preventing application of harmful magical effects.  Damage absorbed by Anti-Magic Shell energizes the Death Knight with additional runic power.  Lasts 5 sec.

abilities.name: Blood Boil
abilities.description: Boils the blood of all enemies within 10 yards, dealing 180 to 220 Shadow damage.  Deals additional damage to targets infected with Blood Plague or Frost Fever.

abilities.name: Death Pact
abilities.description: Sacrifices an undead minion, healing the Death Knight for 40% of his maximum health.  This heal cannot be a critical.

abilities.name: Acherus Deathcharger
abilities.description: Summons and dismisses your rideable Acherus Deathcharger.  This is a very fast mount.

abilities.name: Icebound Fortitude
abilities.description: The Death Knight freezes his blood to become immune to Stun effects and reduce all damage taken by Glyph of Icebound Fortitude 40 30% plus additional damage reduction based on Defense for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Obliterate
abilities.description: A brutal instant attack that deals 80% weapon damage plus 467, total damage increased 12.5% per each of your diseases on the target, but consumes the diseases.
abilities.cost: 1 Frost Rune / 1 Unholy Rune / -15 Runic Power

abilities.name: Frozen Rune Weapon
abilities.description: Imbues your rune weapon with the power of frost.  For the next 30 minutes your melee swings have  a chance to cause your target to take an additional 2% damage from Frost for 20 sec.  This effect stacks up to 10 times.

abilities.name: Forceful Deflection
abilities.description: Increases your Parry Rating by 25% of your total Strength.

abilities.name: Death Grip
abilities.description: Harness the unholy energy that surrounds and binds all matter, drawing the target toward the death knight and forcing the enemy to attack the death knight for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Pestilence
abilities.description: Spreads existing Blood Plague and Frost Fever infections from your target to all other enemies within 10 yards.

abilities.name: Death Gate
abilities.description: Opens a gate which the Death Knight can use to return to Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: On a Pale Horse
abilities.description: You become as hard to stop as death itself.  The duration of all Stun and Fear effects used against you is reduced by 10%, and your mounted speed is increased by 10%.  This does not stack with other movement speed increasing effects.

abilities.name: Rune of Swordshattering
abilities.description: Affixes your two-handed rune weapon with a rune that increases Parry chance by 4% and reduces the duration of Disarm effects by 50%.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Rune of Lichbane
abilities.description: Affixes your rune weapon with a rune that adds 2% extra weapon damage as Fire damage or 4% versus Undead targets.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Rune of Cinderglacier
abilities.description: Affixes your rune weapon with a rune that has a chance to increase the damage by 20% for your next 2 attacks that deal Frost or Shadow damage.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Rune of Spellshattering
abilities.description: Affixes your two-handed rune weapon with a rune that deflects 4% of all spell damage and reduces the duration of Silence effects by 50%.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Rune of Razorice
abilities.description: Affixes your weapon with a rune that causes 2% extra weapon damage as Frost damage and increases enemies' vulnerability to your Frost attacks. Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Rune of the Fallen Crusader
abilities.description: Affixes your rune weapon with a rune that has a chance to heal you for 3% and increase total Strength by 15% for 15 sec.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Runeforging
abilities.description: Allows the Death Knight to emblazon their weapon with runes.

abilities.name: Rune of Swordbreaking
abilities.description: Affixes your one-handed rune weapon with a rune that increases Parry chance by 2% and reduces the duration of Disarm effects by 50%.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Rune of Spellbreaking
abilities.description: Affixes your one-handed rune weapon with a rune that deflects 2% of all spell damage and reduces the duration of Silence effects by 50% (not cumulative with additional Silence duration reduction).  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Dark Command
abilities.description: Commands the target to attack you, but has no effect if the target is already attacking you.

abilities.name: Rune Strike
abilities.description: Strike the target for 150% weapon damage plus (150 * Attack power * 10 / 10000).  Only usable after the Death Knight dodges or parries.  Can't be dodged, blocked, or parried.  This attack causes a high amount of threat.

abilities.name: Horn of Winter
abilities.description: The Death Knight blows the Horn of Winter, which generates 10 runic power and increases total Strength and Agility of all party or raid members within 30 yards by 155.  Lasts 2 min.

abilities.name: Blood Plague
abilities.description: A disease dealing (0 * 1.15 + Attack power * 0.055 * 1.15) Shadow damage every 3 sec for 15 sec.  Caused by Plague Strike and other abilities. Base damage 0 Bonus from attack power (Attack power * 0.055 * 1.15)

abilities.name: Frost Fever
abilities.description: A disease dealing (0 * 1.15 + Attack power * 0.055 * 1.15) Frost damage every 3 sec and reducing the target's melee and ranged attack speed by 14% for 15 sec.  Caused by Icy Touch and other spells. Base damage 0 Bonus from attack power (Attack power * 0.055 * 1.15)

abilities.name: Raise Ally
abilities.description: Raises the corpse of a raid or party member to fight by your side.  The player will have control over the Ghoul for 5 min.

abilities.name: Rune of the Stoneskin Gargoyle
abilities.description: Affixes your two-handed rune weapon with a rune that increases Defense by 25 and total Stamina by 2%.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Rune of the Nerubian Carapace
abilities.description: Affixes your rune weapon with a rune that increases Defense by 13 and total Stamina by 1%.  Modifying your rune weapon requires a Rune Forge in Ebon Hold.

abilities.name: Demoralizing Roar
abilities.description: The druid roars, decreasing nearby enemies' melee attack power by 411.  Lasts 30 sec.

abilities.name: Entangling Roots
abilities.description: Roots the target in place and causes 423 Nature damage over 27 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

abilities.name: Thorns
abilities.description: Thorns sprout from the friendly target causing 73 Nature damage to attackers when hit.  Lasts 10 min.

abilities.name: Tranquility
abilities.description: Heals all nearby group members for 3035 every 2 seconds for 8 sec.  Druid must channel to maintain the spell.

abilities.name: Cat Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into cat form, increasing melee attack power by 40 plus Agility.  Also protects the caster from Polymorph effects and allows the use of various cat abilities. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Swipe (Bear)
abilities.description: Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting 108 damage.  Damage increased by attack power.

abilities.name: Faerie Fire
abilities.description: Decrease the armor of the target by 5% for 5 min.  While affected, the target cannot stealth or turn invisible.

abilities.name: Rejuvenation
abilities.description: Heals the target for [338 * (5 + 0 ) * ( ( ( ( 1 ) ) ) )] over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Travel Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into travel form, increasing movement speed by 40%.  Also protects the caster from Polymorph effects.  Only useable outdoors. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Aquatic Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into aquatic form, increasing swim speed by 50% and allowing the druid to breathe underwater.  Also protects the caster from Polymorph effects. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Rip
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes damage over time.  Damage increases per combo point and by your attack power:   1 point: [(36 + 93 * 1 + 0.01 * Attack power) * 6 ] damage over 12 sec.   2 points: [(36 + 93 * 2 + 0.02 * Attack power) * 6 ] damage over 12 sec.   3 points: [(36 + 93 * 3 + 0.03 * Attack power) * 6 ] damage over 12 sec.   4 points: [(36 + 93 * 4 + 0.04 * Attack power) * 6 ] damage over 12 sec.   5 points: [(36 + 93 * 5 + 0.05 * Attack power) * 6 ] damage over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Claw
abilities.description: Claw the enemy, causing 370 additional damage.  Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Mark of the Wild
abilities.description: Increases the friendly target's armor by 750, all attributes by 37 and all resistances by 54 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Rake
abilities.description: Rake the target for (Attack power / 100 + 176) bleed damage and an additional (358 * 3 + Attack power * 0.18) damage over 9 sec.  Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Dash
abilities.description: Increases movement speed by 70% while in Cat Form for 15 sec.  Does not break prowling.

abilities.name: Hibernate
abilities.description: Forces the enemy target to sleep for up to 40 sec.  Any damage will awaken the target.  Only one target can be forced to hibernate at a time.  Only works on Beasts and Dragonkin.

abilities.name: Remove Curse
abilities.description: Dispels 1 Curse from a friendly target.

abilities.name: Abolish Poison
abilities.description: Attempts to cure 1 poison effect on the target, and 1 more poison effect every 3 seconds for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Soothe Animal
abilities.description: Soothes the target beast, reducing the range at which it will attack you by 10 yards.  Only affects Beast and Dragonkin targets level 85 or lower.  Lasts 15 sec.

abilities.name: Starfire
abilities.description: Causes 1038 to 1222 Arcane damage to the target.

abilities.name: Wrath
abilities.description: Causes 557 to 627 Nature damage to the target.

abilities.name: Healing Touch
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for 3761 to 4440.

abilities.name: Challenging Roar
abilities.description: Forces all nearby enemies within 10 yards to focus attacks on you for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.description: Stuns the target for 4 sec and interrupts non-player spellcasting for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Prowl
abilities.description: Allows the Druid to prowl around, but reduces your movement speed by 30%.  Lasts until cancelled.

abilities.name: Tiger's Fury
abilities.description: Increases damage done by 80 for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Shred
abilities.description: Shred the target, causing 225% damage plus 666 to the target.  Must be behind the target.  Awards 1 combo point.  Effects which increase Bleed damage also increase Shred damage.

abilities.name: Track Humanoids
abilities.description: Shows the location of all nearby humanoids on the minimap.  Only one type of thing can be tracked at a time.

abilities.name: Enrage
abilities.description: Generates 20 rage, and then generates an additional 10 rage over 10 sec, but reduces base armor by 27% in Bear Form and 16% in Dire Bear Form.

abilities.name: Tree of Life
abilities.description: Shapeshift into the Tree of Life. While in this form you increase healing received by 6% for all party and raid members within 100 yards, and you can only cast Restoration spells in addition to Innervate, Barkskin, Nature's Grasp and Thorns spells. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Bear Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into bear form, increasing melee attack power by 120, armor contribution from cloth and leather items by 180%, and Stamina by 25%.  Also protects the caster from Polymorph effects and allows the use of various bear abilities. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Ravage
abilities.description: Ravage the target, causing 385% damage plus 1771 to the target.  Must be prowling and behind the target.  Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Growl
abilities.description: Taunts the target to attack you, but has no effect if the target is already attacking you.

abilities.name: Maul
abilities.description: A strong attack that increases melee damage by 578 and causes a high amount of threat.  Effects which increase Bleed damage also increase Maul damage.

abilities.name: Moonfire
abilities.description: Burns the enemy for 406 to 476 Arcane damage and then an additional 800 Arcane damage over 12 sec.

abilities.name: Regrowth
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for 2257 to 2518 and another [335 * (7 + 0 * 2) * ( ( ( ( 1 ) ) ) )] over 21 sec.

abilities.name: Cure Poison
abilities.description: Cures 1 poison effect on the target.

abilities.name: Cower
abilities.description: Cower, causing no damage but lowering your threat a large amount, making the enemy less likely to attack you.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: Pounce, stunning the target for 3 sec and causing 2100 damage over 18 sec.  Must be prowling.  Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Dire Bear Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into dire bear form, increasing melee attack power by 120, armor contribution from cloth and leather items by 370%, and Stamina by 25%.  Also protects the caster from Polymorph effects and allows the use of various bear abilities. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Nature's Grasp
abilities.description: While active, any time an enemy strikes the caster they have a 100% chance to become afflicted by Entangling Roots (Rank 8).  3 charges.  Lasts 45 sec.

abilities.name: Faerie Fire (Feral)
abilities.description: Decrease the armor of the target by 5% for 5 min.  While affected, the target cannot stealth or turn invisible.  Deals (Attack power * 0.15 + 1) damage and additional threat when used in Bear Form or Dire Bear Form.

abilities.name: Hurricane
abilities.description: Creates a violent storm in the target area causing 451 Nature damage to enemies every 1 sec, Glyph of Hurricane reducing movement speed by 20% and increasing the time between attacks by 20%.  Lasts 10 sec.  Druid must channel to maintain the spell.

abilities.name: Primal Fury
abilities.description: Gives you a 100% chance to gain an additional 5 Rage anytime you get a critical strike while in Bear and Dire Bear Form.

abilities.name: Feral Charge - Bear
abilities.description: Causes you to charge an enemy, immobilizing and interrupting any spell being cast for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Teleport: Moonglade
abilities.description: Teleports the caster to the Moonglade.

abilities.name: Rebirth
abilities.description: Returns the spirit to the body, restoring a dead target to life with Glyph of Rebirth 100% 6400 health and 4700 mana.

abilities.name: Feline Grace
abilities.description: Reduces damage from falling.

abilities.name: Gift of the Wild
abilities.description: Gives the Gift of the Wild to all party and raid members, increasing armor by 750, all attributes by 37 and all resistances by 54 for 1 hour.

abilities.name: Ferocious Bite
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes damage per combo point and converts each extra point of energy (up to a maximum of 30 extra energy) into (9.39999962 + Attack power / 410) additional damage.  Damage is increased by your attack power.   1 point  : (120 + 290 * 1 + 0.07 * Attack power)-(260 + 290 * 1 + 0.07 * Attack power) damage   2 points: (120 + 290 * 2 + 0.14 * Attack power)-(260 + 290 * 2 + 0.14 * Attack power) damage   3 points: (120 + 290 * 3 + 0.21 * Attack power)-(260 + 290 * 3 + 0.21 * Attack power) damage   4 points: (120 + 290 * 4 + 0.28 * Attack power)-(260 + 290 * 4 + 0.28 * Attack power) damage   5 points: (120 + 290 * 5 + 0.35 * Attack power)-(260 + 290 * 5 + 0.35 * Attack power) damage

abilities.name: Maim
abilities.description: Finishing move that causes damage and stuns the target.  Non-player victim spellcasting is also interrupted for 3 sec.  Causes more damage and lasts longer per combo point:   1 point  : (158 * 1 + 66 + Mainhand weapon min damage)-(158 * 1 + 66 + Mainhand weapon max damage) damage, 1 sec   2 points: (158 * 2 + 66 + Mainhand weapon min damage)-(158 * 2 + 66 + Mainhand weapon max damage) damage, 2 sec   3 points: (158 * 3 + 66 + Mainhand weapon min damage)-(158 * 3 + 66 + Mainhand weapon max damage) damage, 3 sec   4 points: (158 * 4 + 66 + Mainhand weapon min damage)-(158 * 4 + 66 + Mainhand weapon max damage) damage, 4 sec   5 points: (158 * 5 + 66 + Mainhand weapon min damage)-(158 * 5 + 66 + Mainhand weapon max damage) damage, 5 sec

abilities.name: Barkskin
abilities.description: The druid's skin becomes as tough as bark.  All damage taken is reduced by 20%.  While protected, damaging attacks will not cause spellcasting delays.  This spell is usable while stunned, frozen, incapacitated, feared or asleep.  Usable in all forms.  Lasts 12 sec.

abilities.name: Frenzied Regeneration
abilities.description: Converts up to 10 rage per second into health for 10 sec.  Each point of rage is converted into 0.3% of max health.

abilities.name: Innervate
abilities.description: Causes the target to regenerate mana equal to 225% of the casting Druid's base mana pool over 10 sec.

abilities.name: Lacerate
abilities.description: Lacerates the enemy target, dealing 88 damage and making them bleed for 320 damage over 15 sec and causing a high amount of threat.  Damage increased by attack power.  This effect stacks up to 5 times on the same target.

abilities.name: Lifebloom
abilities.description: Heals the target for [53 * (7 + 0 * 2) * ( ( ( ( 1 ) ) ) )] over 7 sec.  When Lifebloom completes its duration or is dispelled, the target instantly heals themself for 776 and the Druid regains half the cost of the spell.  This effect can stack up to 3 times on the same target.

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.description: Tosses the enemy target into the air, preventing all action but making them invulnerable for up to 6 sec.  Only one target can be affected by your Cyclone at a time.

abilities.name: Mangle (Cat)
abilities.description: Mangle the target for 200% normal damage plus 566 and causes the target to take 30% additional damage from bleed effects for 1 min.  Awards 1 combo point.

abilities.name: Mangle (Bear)
abilities.description: Mangle the target for 115% normal damage plus 299 and causes the target to take 30% additional damage from bleed effects for 1 min.

abilities.name: Flight Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into flight form, increasing movement speed by 150% and allowing you to fly.  Cannot use in combat.  Can only use this form in Outland or Northrend. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Swift Flight Form
abilities.description: Shapeshift into swift flight form, increasing movement speed by 280% and allowing you to fly.  Cannot use in combat.  Can only use this form in Outland or Northrend. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

abilities.name: Feral Charge - Cat
abilities.description: Causes you to leap behind an enemy, dazing them for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Nourish
abilities.description: Heals a friendly target for 1883 to 2187. Heals for an additional 20% if you have a Rejuvenation, Regrowth, Lifebloom, or Wild Growth effect active on the target.

abilities.name: Revive
abilities.description: Returns the spirit to the body, restoring a dead target to life with 1800 health and 1365 mana.  Cannot be cast when in combat.

abilities.name: Savage Roar
abilities.description: Finishing move that increases physical damage done by 30%.  Only useable while in Cat Form.  Lasts longer per combo point:   1 point  : 14 seconds   2 points: 19 seconds   3 points: 24 seconds   4 points: 29 seconds   5 points: 34 seconds

abilities.name: Swipe (Cat)
abilities.description: Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting 250% weapon damage.

abilities.name: Savage Defense
abilities.description: Each time you deal a critical strike while in Bear Form or Dire Bear Form, you gain Savage Defense, reducing the damage taken from the next physical attack that strikes you by 25% of your attack power.

abilities.name: Auto Shot
abilities.description: Automatically shoots the target until cancelled.  Ranged attacks fired by a Hunter all have 15% increased attack speed.

abilities.name: Mend Pet
abilities.description: Heals your pet for 5250 health over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: You attempt to disengage from combat, leaping backwards. Can only be used while in combat.

abilities.name: Call Pet
abilities.description: Summons your pet to you.

abilities.name: Revive Pet
abilities.description: Revive your pet, returning it to life with 15% of its base health.

abilities.name: Eyes of the Beast
abilities.description: Take direct control of your pet and see through its eyes for 1 min.

abilities.name: Hunter's Mark
abilities.description: Places the Hunter's Mark on the target, increasing the ranged attack power of all attackers against that target by 500.  In addition, the target of this ability can always be seen by the hunter whether it stealths or turns invisible.  The target also appears on the mini-map.  Lasts for 5 min.

abilities.name: Beast Lore
abilities.description: Gather information about the target beast.  The tooltip will display damage, health, armor, any special resistances, and diet.  In addition, Beast Lore will reveal whether or not the creature is tameable and what abilities the tamed creature has.

abilities.name: Track Beasts
abilities.description: Shows the location of all nearby beasts on the minimap.  Only one form of tracking can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Mongoose Bite
abilities.description: Attack the enemy for (Attack power * 0.2 + 280) damage.

abilities.name: Freezing Trap
abilities.description: Place a frost trap that freezes the first enemy that approaches, preventing all action for up to 20 sec.  Any damage caused will break the ice.  Trap will exist for 30 sec.  Only one trap can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.description: Continuously fires a volley of ammo at the target area, causing (Ranged attack power * 0.083700 + 353) Arcane damage to enemy targets within 8 yards every 1.00 seconds for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Scare Beast
abilities.description: Scares a beast, causing it to run in fear for up to 20 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.  Only one beast can be feared at a time.

abilities.name: Tame Beast
abilities.description: Begins taming a beast to be your companion.  Your armor is reduced by 100% while you focus on taming the beast for 20 sec.  If you lose the beast's attention for any reason, the taming process will fail.  Once tamed, the beast will be very unhappy and disloyal.  Try feeding the pet immediately to make it happy.

abilities.name: Flare
abilities.description: Exposes all hidden and invisible enemies within 10 yards of the targeted area for 20 sec.

abilities.name: Serpent Sting
abilities.description: Stings the target, causing (Ranged attack power * 0.2 + 242 * 15 / 3) Nature damage over 15 sec.  Only one Sting per Hunter can be active on any one target.

abilities.name: Dismiss Pet
abilities.description: Dismiss your pet.  Dismissing your pet will reduce its happiness by 50.

abilities.name: Multi-Shot
abilities.description: Fires several missiles, hitting 3 targets for an additional 408 damage.

abilities.name: Raptor Strike
abilities.description: A strong attack that increases melee damage by 335.

abilities.name: Wing Clip
abilities.description: Maims the enemy, reducing the target's movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Viper Sting
abilities.description: Stings the target, draining 4% mana over 8 sec (up to a maximum of 8% of the caster's maximum mana), and energizing the Hunter equal to 300% of the amount drained.  Only one Sting per Hunter can be active on any one target.

abilities.name: Scorpid Sting
abilities.description: Stings the target, reducing chance to hit with melee and ranged attacks by 3% for 20 sec.  Only one Sting per Hunter can be active on any one target.

abilities.name: Arcane Shot
abilities.description: An instant shot that causes (Ranged attack power * 0.15 + 492) Arcane damage.

abilities.name: Rapid Fire
abilities.description: Increases ranged attack speed by 40% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Concussive Shot
abilities.description: Dazes the target, slowing movement speed by 50% for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Cheetah
abilities.description: The hunter takes on the aspects of a cheetah, increasing movement speed by 30%.  If the hunter is struck, he will be dazed for 4 sec.  Only one Aspect can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Feign Death
abilities.description: Feign death which may trick enemies into ignoring you.  Lasts up to 6 min.

abilities.name: Eagle Eye
abilities.description: Zooms in the hunter's vision.  Only usable outdoors.  Lasts 1 min.

abilities.name: Feed Pet
abilities.description: Feed your pet the selected item.  Feeding your pet increases happiness.  Using food close to the pet's level will have a better result.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Pack
abilities.description: The hunter and raid members within 40 yards take on the aspects of a pack of cheetahs, increasing movement speed by 30%.  If you are struck under the effect of this aspect, you will be dazed for 4 sec.  Only one Aspect can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Beast
abilities.description: The hunter takes on the aspects of a beast, becoming untrackable and increasing melee attack power of the hunter and the hunter's pet by 10%.  Only one Aspect can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Monkey
abilities.description: The hunter takes on the aspects of a monkey, increasing chance to dodge by 18%.  Only one Aspect can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Aspect of the Hawk
abilities.description: The hunter takes on the aspects of a hawk, increasing ranged attack power by 155.  Only one Aspect can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Immolation Trap
abilities.description: Place a fire trap that will burn the first enemy to approach for [(Ranged attack power * ( 2 / 100) + 377) * 5 ] Fire damage over 15 sec.  Trap will exist for 30 sec.  Only one trap can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Frost Trap
abilities.description: Place a frost trap that creates an ice slick around itself for 30 sec when the first enemy approaches it.  All enemies within 10 yards will be slowed by 50% while in the area of effect.  Trap will exist for 30 sec.  Only one trap can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Explosive Trap

abilities.description: Subjugates the target demon, up to level 84, forcing it to do your bidding.  While subjugated, the time between the demon's attacks is increased by 30% and its casting speed is slowed by 20%.  Lasts up to 5 min.

abilities.name: Drain Soul
abilities.description: Drains the soul of the target, causing 710 Shadow damage over 15 sec.  If the target is at or below 25% health, Drain Soul causes four times the normal damage. If the target dies while being drained, and yields experience or honor, the caster gains a Soul Shard.  Each time the Drain Soul damages the target, it also has a chance to generate a Soul Shard.  Soul Shards are required for other spells.

abilities.name: Inferno
abilities.description: Summons a meteor from the Twisting Nether, causing 200 Fire damage and stunning all enemy targets in the area for 2 sec.  An Infernal rises from the crater, under the command of the caster for 1 min.

abilities.name: Life Tap
abilities.description: Converts ( 2000 + Spirit * 1.5) health into [ 2000 * ( 1 ) + Spell power * .5 * ( 1 )] mana.  Spell power increases the amount of mana returned.

abilities.name: Curse of the Elements
abilities.description: Curses the target for 5 min, reducing Arcane, Fire, Frost, Nature, and Shadow resistances by 165 and increasing magic damage taken by 13%.  Only one Curse per Warlock can be active on any one target.

abilities.name: Curse of Tongues
abilities.description: Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30%.  Only one Curse per Warlock can be active on any one target.  Lasts 30 sec.

abilities.name: Hellfire
abilities.description: Ignites the area surrounding the caster, causing 453 Fire damage to himself and 453 Fire damage to all nearby enemies every 1 sec.  Lasts 15 sec.

abilities.name: Create Spellstone
abilities.description: While applied to target weapon it increases damage dealt by periodic spells by 1% and spell haste rating by 60.  Lasts for 1 hour.

abilities.name: Drain Mana
abilities.description: Transfers 3% of target's maximum mana every 1 sec from the target to the caster (up to a maximum of 6% of the caster's maximum mana every 1 sec).  Lasts 5 sec.

abilities.name: Howl of Terror
abilities.description: Howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in terror for 8 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

abilities.name: Sense Demons
abilities.description: Shows the location of all nearby demons on the minimap until cancelled.  Only one form of tracking can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Searing Pain
abilities.description: Inflict searing pain on the enemy target, causing 347 to 410 Fire damage.  Causes a high amount of threat.

abilities.name: Unending Breath
abilities.description: Allows the target to breathe underwater for 10 min Glyph of Unending Breath and increases swim speed by 20% .

abilities.name: Create Healthstone
abilities.description: Creates a Fel Healthstone that can be used to instantly restore 4280 health. Conjured items disappear if logged out for more than 15 minutes.

abilities.name: Rain of Fire
abilities.description: Calls down a fiery rain to burn enemies in the area of effect for ( 677 * 4) Fire damage over 8 sec.

abilities.name: Fear
abilities.description: Strikes fear in the enemy, causing it to run in fear for up to 20 sec.  Damage caused may interrupt the effect.  Only 1 target can be feared at a time.

abilities.name: Felsteed
abilities.description: Summons a Felsteed, which serves as a mount.

abilities.name: Shadow Ward
abilities.description: Absorbs 3300 shadow damage.  Lasts 30 sec.

abilities.name: Soul Fire
abilities.description: Burn the enemy's soul, causing 1323 to 1657 Fire damage.

abilities.name: Create Firestone
abilities.description: While applied to target weapon it increases damage dealt by direct spells by 1% and spell critical strike rating by 49.  Lasts for 1 hour.

abilities.name: Death Coil
abilities.description: Causes the enemy target to run in horror for 3 sec and causes 800 Shadow damage.  The caster gains 300% of the damage caused in health.

abilities.name: Ritual of Doom
abilities.description: Begins a ritual that sacrifices a random participant's health to summon a doomguard. Requires the caster and 4 additional party members to complete the ritual.  In order to participate, all players must right-click the portal and not move until the ritual is complete.

abilities.name: Dreadsteed
abilities.description: Summons a Dreadsteed, which serves as a mount.  This is a very fast mount.

abilities.name: Seed of Corruption
abilities.description: Imbeds a demon seed in the enemy target, causing 1518 Shadow damage over 18 sec.  When the target takes 1518 total damage or dies, the seed will inflict 1633 to 1897 Shadow damage to all enemies within 15 yards of the target.  Only one Corruption spell per Warlock can be active on any one target.

abilities.name: Fel Armor
abilities.description: Surrounds the caster with fel energy, increasing spell power by 180 plus additional spell power equal to 30% of your Spirit. In addition, you regain 2% of your maximum health every 5 sec. Only one type of Armor spell can be active on the Warlock at any time.  Lasts 30 min.

abilities.name: Incinerate
abilities.description: Deals 582 to 676 Fire damage to your target and an additional 145 to 169 Fire damage if the target is affected by an Immolate spell.

abilities.name: Soulshatter
abilities.description: Reduces threat by 50% for all enemies within 50 yards.

abilities.name: Ritual of Souls
abilities.description: Begins a ritual that creates a Soulwell.  Raid members can click the Soulwell to acquire a Fel Healthstone.  The Soulwell lasts for 3 min or 25 charges.  Requires the caster and 2 additional party members to complete the ritual.  In order to participate, all players must right-click the soul portal and not move until the ritual is complete.

abilities.name: Shadowflame
abilities.description: Targets in a cone in front of the caster take 615 to 671 Shadow damage and an additional 644 Fire damage over 8 sec.

abilities.name: Demonic Circle: Summon
abilities.description: You summon a Demonic Circle at your feet, lasting 6 min. You can only have one Demonic Circle active at a time.

abilities.name: Demonic Circle: Teleport
abilities.description: Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all snare effects.

abilities.name: Shadow Cleave
abilities.description: Inflicts 110 Shadow damage to an enemy target and nearby allies, affecting up to 3 targets.

abilities.name: Immolation Aura
abilities.description: Ignites the area surrounds you, causing 251 Fire damage to all nearby enemies every 1 sec.  Lasts 15 sec.

abilities.name: Demon Charge
abilities.description: Charge an enemy, stunning it for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Challenging Howl
abilities.description: Taunts all enemies within 10 yards for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.description: A defensive combat stance.  Decreases damage taken by 10% and damage caused by 5%.  Increases threat generated.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: Bash the target with your shield dazing them and interrupting spellcasting, which prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Heroic Strike
abilities.description: A strong attack that increases melee damage by 495 and causes a high amount of threat.  Causes 173 additional damage against Dazed targets.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Charge an enemy, generate 15 rage, and stun it for 1.50 sec.  Cannot be used in combat.

abilities.name: Taunt
abilities.description: Taunts the target to attack you, but has no effect if the target is already attacking you.

abilities.name: Commanding Shout
abilities.description: Increases maximum health of all party and raid members within 30 yards by 2255.  Lasts 2 min.

abilities.name: Disarm
abilities.description: Disarm the enemy's main hand and ranged weapons for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Mocking Blow
abilities.description: A mocking attack that causes a moderate amount of threat and forces the target to focus attacks on you for 6 sec.  If the target is tauntable, also deals weapon damage.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.description: Wounds the target causing them to bleed for 380 damage plus an additional [0.2 * 5 * ((Mainhand weapon max base damage + Mainhand weapon min base damage) / 2 + Attack power / 14 * Mainhand weapon base speed)] (based on weapon damage) over 15 sec.  If used while your target is above 75% health, Rend does 35% more damage.

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: A sweeping attack that does your weapon damage plus 222 to the target and his Glyph of Cleaving two nearest allies nearest ally.

abilities.name: Shield Wall
abilities.description: Reduces all damage taken by 60% for 12 sec.

abilities.name: Demoralizing Shout
abilities.description: Reduces the melee attack power of all enemies within 10 yards by 411 for 30 sec.

abilities.name: Challenging Shout
abilities.description: Forces all enemies within 10 yards to focus attacks on you for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Slam
abilities.description: Slams the opponent, causing weapon damage plus 250.

abilities.name: Whirlwind
abilities.description: In a whirlwind of steel you attack up to 4 enemies within 8 yards, causing weapon damage from both melee weapons to each enemy.

abilities.name: Hamstring
abilities.description: Maims the enemy, reducing movement speed by 50% for 15 sec Glyph of Hamstring and has a 10% chance to immobilize the target for 5 sec .

abilities.name: Recklessness
abilities.description: Your next 3 special ability attacks have an additional 100% to critically hit but all damage taken is increased by 20%.  Lasts 12 sec.

abilities.name: Battle Shout
abilities.description: The warrior shouts, increasing attack power of all raid and party members within 30 yards by 550.  Lasts 2 min.

abilities.name: Battle Stance
abilities.description: A balanced combat stance that increases the armor penetration of all of your attacks by 10%.

abilities.name: Berserker Stance
abilities.description: An aggressive stance.  Critical hit chance is increased by 3% and all damage taken is increased by 5%.

abilities.name: Shield Block
abilities.description: Increases your chance to block and block value by 100% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Bloodrage
abilities.description: Generates 20 rage at the cost of health, and then generates an additional Anger Management 13 10 rage over 10 sec.

abilities.name: Intervene
abilities.description: Run at high speed towards a party member, intercepting the next melee or ranged attack made against them as well as reducing their total threat by 10%.

abilities.name: Intimidating Shout
abilities.description: The warrior shouts, causing up to 5 enemies within 8 yards to cower in fear.  The targeted enemy will be unable to move while cowering.  Lasts 8 sec.

abilities.name: Execute
abilities.description: Attempt to finish off a wounded foe, causing (1456 + Attack power * 0.2) damage and converting each extra point of rage into 38 additional damage (up to a maximum cost of 30 rage).  Only usable on enemies that have less than 20% health.

abilities.name: Thunder Clap
abilities.description: Blasts nearby enemies increasing the time between their attacks by 10% for 30 sec and doing 300 damage to them.  Damage increased by attack power.  This ability causes additional threat.

abilities.name: Pummel
abilities.description: Pummel the target, interrupting spellcasting and preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec.

abilities.name: Revenge
abilities.description: Instantly counterattack an enemy for (1636 + Attack power * 0.310) to (1998 + Attack power * 0.310) damage.   Revenge is only usable after the warrior blocks, dodges or parries an attack.

abilities.name: Overpower
abilities.description: Instantly overpower the enemy, causing weapon damage.  Only useable after the target dodges.  The Overpower cannot be blocked, dodged or parried.

abilities.name: Sunder Armor
abilities.description: Sunders the target's armor, reducing it by 4% per Sunder Armor and causes a high amount of threat.  Threat increased by attack power.  Can be applied up to 5 times.  Lasts 30 sec.

abilities.name: Stance Mastery
abilities.description: You retain up to 10 of your rage points when you change stances.

abilities.name: Berserker Rage
abilities.description: The warrior enters a berserker rage, removing and granting immunity to Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects and generating extra rage when taking damage.  Lasts 10 sec.

abilities.name: Retaliation
abilities.description: Instantly counterattack any enemy that strikes you in melee for 12 sec.  Melee attacks made from behind cannot be counterattacked.  A maximum of 20 attacks will cause retaliation.

abilities.name: Intercept
abilities.description: Charge an enemy, causing (Attack power * 0.12) damage (based on attack power) and stunning it for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Spell Reflection
abilities.description: Raise your shield, reflecting the next spell cast on you.  Lasts 5 sec.

abilities.name: Shield Slam
abilities.description: Slam the target with your shield, causing 990 to 1040 damage, modified by your shield block value, and dispels 1 magic effect on the target.  Also causes a high amount of threat.

abilities.name: Victory Rush
abilities.description: Instantly attack the target causing (Attack power * 45 / 100) damage.  Can only be used within 20 sec after you kill an enemy that yields experience or honor.  Damage is based on your attack power.

abilities.name: Enraged Regeneration
abilities.description: You regenerate 30% of your total health over 10 sec.  This ability requires an Enrage effect, consumes all Enrage effects and prevents any from affecting you for the full duration.

abilities.name: Heroic Throw
abilities.description: Throws your weapon at the enemy causing (12 + Attack power * .50) damage (based on attack power).  This ability causes high threat.

abilities.name: Shattering Throw
abilities.description: Throws your weapon at the enemy causing (12 + Attack power * .50) damage (based on attack power), reducing the armor on the target by 20% for 10 sec or removing any invulnerabilities.
